compiled_state.title: #2 Step 5: remove REBAR_NATIVE_READS kill-switch (tracked up front, tied to a named release)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Remove the LIBRARY's subprocess read branch + the kill-switch after one release with no parity escapes reported. The engine scripts STAY for the CLI/bash path — removal targets the dual path in src/rebar/__init__.py only. Filed up front (per review) so the dual read path can't ossify. AC: dual path gone; single in-process read path; release named in this ticket before Step 3 merges.

comments.body: Done (per user direction to complete the epic now): removed the REBAR_NATIVE_READS kill-switch + subprocess read fallback; reads are unconditionally in-process. Parity test re-anchored on the bash dispatcher (rebar._engine.run) so the 26-case oracle survives. Commit a93885e. Note: removed within the 0.2.0 cycle rather than after a soak — accepted by user.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
